evals.prompt: How do I read recent iMessages for a specific contact from chat.db?
evals.expected_output: SQLite query against ~/Library/Messages/chat.db with handle join
expectations: Provides a SQLite query joining message and handle tables
Notes that this must run on the Mac, not Railway
Explains the Apple epoch date format

evals.prompt: I want to send an iMessage from the CRM. How should this work?
evals.expected_output: Explanation of the two-repo boundary and the draft-to-send flow
expectations: Explains that iMessage sending cannot happen from Railway
Describes the flow: CRM creates draft → sync agent pulls → local script sends
Mentions osascript as the sending mechanism
Notes that the full send pipeline is not yet implemented
